GuessTheGame
A daily video game guessing challenge.

HERO
Guess The Price

Guess today’s price from a sequence of images. Wrong guesses unlock more clues.

Each wrong guess unlocks the next, clearer image (controlled by the images field in data/games.json).
Your guess
Guesses left: 6 / 6
How to add your own games
  • Put 6 images per game under public/images/ (from hardest to easiest / blurriest to clearest).
  • In data/games.json, update the corresponding images array to point at those paths.
  • The daily puzzle cycles through your list based on the date (UTC).

HOW TO PLAY

  1. Start with the first image clue.
  2. Type your guess and submit.
  3. Each wrong guess unlocks the next clue.
  4. You have up to 6 guesses to find the answer.

MORE GAMES

Guess The Game

Reveal images step by step and guess today’s video game.

Guess The Book

Covers, quotes, or scenes — can you name the book?

Guess The Movie Name

Frames, posters, or props from movies.

Guess The Logo

Cropped brand logos, revealed clue by clue.

Guess The House

Architecture and interiors from famous places.

Guess The Angle

Extreme close-ups and weird angles.

Guess The Phrase

Rebus-style visual puzzles and phrases.

Guess The Song

Album art, lyrics fragments, or music video clues.

Guess The Animal

Silhouettes, habitats, and close-ups.

Guess The Plant

Leaves, flowers, textures — identify the plant.

Guess The Number

Logic hints and visual clues to find the secret number.

TIPS

  • Try different spellings, spacing, and common abbreviations.
  • Focus on colors, UI elements, icons, and distinctive silhouettes.
  • If you’re stuck, take one guess to unlock the next clue quickly.

FAQ

Why didn’t my answer get accepted?

Answers are normalized (case/spacing/punctuation). If it still doesn’t match, add it to acceptableAnswers in the corresponding data file.

Do my stats sync across devices?

Not yet. Statistics are stored in your browser on this device.

How does the daily puzzle rotate?

The game picks an entry based on the current date (UTC) and cycles through your list.
